chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 102 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018 For orders on MA 406/18 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 407/18 For katcha peshi Mr. Omparkash H. Karmani, advocate for petitioners Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and shall provide legal protection to the petitioners. Learned A.A.G. present in court gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioners as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioners does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
